negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_f9b78879-6270-414b-8c32-789b7a2e6f4c
prompt: The video showcases a cozy, well-lit home office, beginning with a refrigerator in the foreground on the left, which reflects faint room details and adds depth. The camera tracks to the right in a wide shot, gradually revealing the room’s layout at eye level. At the center is a sleek wooden desk paired with a tan leather chair with black metal framing, forming a workspace. The desk is neatly arranged with a silver laptop, a mouse, a white mug, a notebook, and a pen. Below, a beige rug adds warmth and texture to the light-colored flooring. To the right, a white wooden shelving unit displays jars, baskets, a picture frame, and potted plants, blending charm with practicality. A smaller wooden rack below is neatly organized, while a TV stand elevates a faint screen. Nearby, a dark wooden door and a pegboard wall-mounted organizer with coiled extension cords highlight the room’s multifunctional nature. A small wooden rack near the door holds a potted plant and storage items, enhancing the homey feeling. On the left, a wooden-framed mirror and a small shelf with plants add greenery and balance. A brown sofa with a light upper part extends toward the curtains, while a tall wooden structure adjacent to the refrigerator comes partially into view. The room’s focal point is the large window at the back, framed by burnt-orange sheer curtains that let in soft natural light. This light is complemented by a circular pendant lamp above the desk, soft lighting strips along the shelves, and a desk lamp near the window, creating a cozy and inviting atmosphere that harmonizes with the light-colored walls.
